title: Aggression
description: At the start of your turn, put a random Attack from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it for the rest of combat.
smart_description: At the start of your turn, put [blue]1[/blue] random Attack from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it for the rest of combat.
notes: Counter type: effect scales with stack count. At 2+ stacks, multiple Attacks are drawn and upgraded each turn.
